question: What is the total quantities of dishes ordered by each customer ? List the customer name and the total quantity .
sql: SELECT customer.Name, SUM(customer_order.Quantity) AS TotalQuantity FROM customer JOIN customer_order ON customer.Customer_ID = customer_order.Customer_ID GROUP BY customer.Customer_ID;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个客户的订单总数量

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求统计每个客户的订单总数量并列出客户姓名和总数量。SQL描述中意图正确，涉及的表、列、聚合函数和分组字段均准确对应。客户姓名通过customer.Name列获取，总数量通过sum(customer_order.Quantity)计算，分组依据customer.Customer_ID确保每个客户独立统计，且无过滤、排序或限制条件差异。
